_readme: DDC harness design-constants manifest (docs/next/design/DDC.md; DRAFT records registry/experiments/ddc0.json + ddc1.json).

Every constant here restates a pinned design stipulation; nothing is tunable at run time. The Modal wrapper stages this file and the staged-bytes manifest sha covers it, so a silent constant change is a pin break.
PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders (donor revisions, corpus shas) are filled by the T0 ops step BEFORE freeze; the runner fails closed (ERR_DDC_UNPINNED) on any null pin in a non-mock run.
Accounts are referenced by env-file basename ONLY (ASM-1664 / RT-14): modal2.env primary, modal3.env + modal4.env spillover, modal.env repaired-or-skipped at T0.

r135.note: BASE checkpoint (ASM-1653); revision PINNED-AT-INPUTS at T0 into pubeval MODEL_REGISTRY too (fail-closed ERR_UNPINNED_MODEL)

r360.note: BASE checkpoint; S2 conditional rung (promotion rule DDC.md section 8)

arm_coverage._source: ASM-1654 / DDC.md section 3 arm x grid coverage

arms_calibration._note: which pinned corpus calibrates which PCA arm (DDC.md section 3); A2 basis comes from the ddc0 max-stat outputs + A1 top-up; M1/M2 are data-free; R1 is seeded Haar

eval.harness: poc/pubeval (ASM-1655; content-hash re-pinned at T0 after the two mechanical additions)
eval.headline: acc_norm (mc) / exact_match (gen); gold_ppl_arc_easy = fluency guard (ASM-1666)

surgery.boundary_convention: L residual boundaries per donor: l=0 embedding output; l=1..L-1 post-residual output of blocks 0..L-2; the post-final-block segment shares the basis of boundary L-1 (harness-level mechanical pin, disclosed in sidecars)
surgery.uncentred_second_moment: ASM-1665: all PCA bases from (1/N) X^T X, energy-ordered, identically in A1/A3/C1/C2/C3 and the A2 top-up

cost_model._note: conservative batch-1 planning constants (pubeval modal README table lineage); dry-plan is fail-closed on the budgets above, never advisory
cost_model.assumed_filter_note: DDC.md section 5.1 disclosure: GSM8K very likely fails the informative-task filter at these donors (base exact-match ~0), removing the generation stage; the dry-plan defaults to this assumption and RE-FAILS CLOSED if invoked with gsm8k retained and the ceiling is exceeded

sharded_launch._note: one INDEPENDENT Modal job per (rung, arm, rho, seed) cell + one A0 job per rung + one g0 job; tags are stable identifiers for --jobs subsetting across accounts (modal2/modal3/modal4 env basenames); every job stays far below the 12 h Modal function timeout

tier_contents.t0: A0 r135 baseline (fixes the informative-task filter + fluency baseline + super-weight census)
tier_contents.s2: A0 r360 + all 18 r360 cells (conditional on the section-8 promotion rule)

law1.statement: LAW-1 (DDC.md section 1.2): no kernel vector ever enters the model weights; kernel text enters as calibration input only; kernel vectors participate only OUTSIDE the model, in selecting which of the model's own activation directions are kept
law1.enforcement: ddc_surgery.py is the ONLY weights-touching module; it accepts bases solely as BasisSpec objects whose provenance is in BASIS_PROVENANCE_ALLOWED and refuses anything else (ERR_DDC_LAW1_TAINT); validate_mock.py additionally asserts STATICALLY that ddc_surgery.py references no kernel/codebook/encoder identifier
